violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the starbucks lowboy, under bar, was observed with a spill/leak. PIC has a service order in process. Employee cleaned spill at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/21/2025

Thermometers in three refrigeration units were observed in poor repair or in need of calibration. Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 04/18/2024
Several boxes of food were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/11/2024

The following non-food contact surfaces were observed with an accumulation of debris: 1) Refrigeration units had spilled food debris and biofilm 2) The walk-in freezer had an accumulation of ice above stored food product 3) Storage racks (used for storage of pet food) had a small amount of old rodent droppings New Violation. Correct By: 04/11/2024
The floors in back storage areas have an accumulation of old rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/11/2024

Employees were observed donning gloves when returning to their station without washing their hands. Food employees must wash their hands before putting on gloves. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/11/2024

Employees were observed using the front hand wash sink as a dump sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/11/2024

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by an accumulation of rodent droppings observed throughout the establishment. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 04/25/2024

An insect control device was observed installed in close proximity to the dish machine, three bay sink, and clean stored equipment. PIC instructed to remove device from this area. New Violation. Correct By: 04/18/2024

The following non-food contact surfaces were observed with an accumulation of debris: 1) The fan in a low boy refrigeration unit had a heavy accumulation of dust 2) The fan cover in the walk-in cooler had dust 3) The storage shelves in the walk-in cooler had dust 4) Containers and storage cubbies had rodent droppings 5) The inside of low boy refrigeration unit had spilled food debris New Violation. Correct By: 04/11/2024

The floors throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue, food debris, and rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/11/2024
